name: Press Security Update v3.4.136
notes:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Security update.** Apply this release promptly through the Press System Updates tool.

## Migration Guide

Use the System Updates tool in Markdown Editor to download and apply `press-system-v3.4.136.zip`.

## System Package

- Asset: `press-system-v3.4.136.zip`
- SHA-256: `3cbff5dc70cd238177e4061e4c42701126d04b910e7967671b63539c067f6a06`

upgradeFrom.message: Press v3.4.64 through v3.4.135 can update directly to security update v3.4.136.
